activities.name: Golden Gate Park
activities.description: A large urban park with gardens, museums, and trails.

activities.name: Lands End Trail
activities.description: Scenic coastal trail with views of the Golden Gate Bridge.

activities.name: Muir Woods
activities.description: Ancient redwood forest with hiking trails.

activities.name: Twin Peaks
activities.description: Panoramic views of the city from these famous hills.

activities.name: Angel Island State Park
activities.description: Island in the bay with hiking trails and historic sites.

activities.name: SFMOMA
activities.description: Modern art museum with works by famous artists.

activities.name: Alcatraz Island
activities.description: Historic prison with audio tour.

activities.name: de Young Museum
activities.description: Fine arts museum in Golden Gate Park.

activities.name: Exploratorium
activities.description: Interactive science museum on the Embarcadero.

activities.name: Palace of Fine Arts
activities.description: Monumental structure originally built for the 1915 Panama-Pacific Exposition.

activities.name: Fisherman's Wharf
activities.description: Popular waterfront area with shops and restaurants.

activities.name: Cable Car Ride
activities.description: Iconic San Francisco experience.

activities.name: Pier 39
activities.description: Shopping center and tourist attraction with sea lion viewing.

activities.name: Ghirardelli Square
activities.description: Historic chocolate factory converted into shops and restaurants.

activities.name: Oracle Park
activities.description: Waterfront baseball stadium, home of the San Francisco Giants.

activities.name: Central Park
activities.description: Massive urban park with lakes, trails, and attractions.

activities.name: High Line
activities.description: Elevated linear park built on a former railroad track.

activities.name: Brooklyn Botanic Garden
activities.description: 52-acre garden with diverse plant collections.

activities.name: Metropolitan Museum of Art
activities.description: One of the world's largest art museums.

activities.name: Broadway Show
activities.description: World-class theatrical performances.

activities.name: Times Square
activities.description: Iconic intersection known for its billboards and theaters.

activities.name: Empire State Building
activities.description: Iconic skyscraper with observation decks.

activities.name: Hyde Park
activities.description: Large park in central London with Serpentine Lake.

activities.name: British Museum
activities.description: World-class museum with artifacts from around the globe.

activities.name: London Eye
activities.description: Giant observation wheel offering panoramic views.
